name: 400 MG Pirfenidone Tablets IP
about: 400 MG Pirfenidone Tablets IP is a medication used in the treatment of idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis (IPF). This medication is manufactured in India and is available in tablet form. The fermentation smell of the tablets is normal, and they have a shelf life of 12-24 months, making them ideal for long-term storage. The recommended storage instructions for these tablets are in a dry place. These tablets contain pirfenidone as the active ingredient, which reduces inflammation and fibrosis in the lungs, thus improving lung function. This medication should only be taken under the guidance of a healthcare professional.

faq.q: What is the recommended dosage for 400 MG Pirfenidone Tablets IP?
faq.a: The recommended dosage for this medication is one tablet taken orally three times a day with food.

faq.q: What is the shelf life of 400 MG Pirfenidone Tablets IP?
faq.a: The shelf life of this medication is 12-24 months.

faq.q: How should 400 MG Pirfenidone Tablets IP be stored?
faq.a: These tablets should be stored in a dry place.

faq.q: What is the active ingredient in 400 MG Pirfenidone Tablets IP?
faq.a: The active ingredient in these tablets is pirfenidone.

faq.q: Can 400 MG Pirfenidone Tablets IP be taken without a prescription?
faq.a: No, this medication should only be taken under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
